title: MistakeEvent
description: Word-level recitation mistake captured by on-device ASR (ADR-0005). Cloud-syncable: contains NO audio, only derived signals (per strategy §24.3 privacy architecture).

wordIndex.description: Word position in the ayah where the mistake was detected. Optional for verse-level errors.

errorType.description: Category. 'mutashabihat-swap' specifically tags confusion between cluster members (drives O-05).

swappedToVerseKey.description: If errorType='mutashabihat-swap', which other verse the user accidentally recited from. Drives confusion-graph (strategy §24.4).

reciterId.description: Reciter context the user was rehearsing in — informs reciter-prosody preference signals (strategy §24.1).

userOverridden.description: True if a user/parent corrected the AI flag (audio was actually correct). Trains the false-positive reducer (strategy §24.4 → outcome O-02).
